review_scope: Targeted checkpoint-4 source-first rerun for repaired findings F001-F003 across the repaired runtime stop-path, wrapper harness-context contract, and directly impacted Phase B docs/verification notes. This rerun reviewed the repaired surfaces and their governing Phase B contract references rather than performing a brand-new full checkpoint-4 review of unrelated unchanged files.
review_coverage: Complete for the targeted rerun scope. Re-read prior checkpoint-4 attempt-1 findings, rechecked the repaired code against the Phase B lifecycle spec and design, inspected the repaired docs and verification notes, ran `bash -n new/user/run_remote_smoke.sh`, reran `cmake -S new/user -B new/out`, reran `cmake --build new/out -j2`, and reran `SMOKE_LOCAL_ONLY=1 SMOKE_MAX_FRAMES=5 VERIFY_LOG_PATH=/tmp/ls2k-phaseb-local-smoke.log new/user/run_remote_smoke.sh`. The local smoke fallback log now records `SMOKE_MAX_FRAMES=5` in the harness block, and the repaired stop-path code now clamps stop-phase turn authority to zero and re-evaluates stop completion using the current shaped command. Caller-supplied host-side stop probe evidence (`STOPPING speed=76.23 turn=0`) is consistent with the repaired zero-turn stop behavior. No remaining materially independent findings were identified within this rerun scope.
reviewed_axes: alignment of repaired docs and verification notes with wrapper semantics
buildability and shell syntax for repaired surfaces
unreviewed_axes: real-vehicle motion behavior outside the provided validation evidence
